output:
## RFP Technical Requirements - Architecture Overview The EAC Request for Proposal covers integrated airport systems across 8 airports with central supervision. ```mermaid flowchart TB subgraph Central["Central Supervision (COC/CCC)"] COC["Central Operations Centre"] CCC["Central Control Centre"] end subgraph Airports["8 EAC Airports"] SHJ["Sharm El-Sheikh"] HRG["Hurghada"] ALY["Alexandria"] ASW["Aswan"] ABS["Abu Simbel"] ASY["Assiut"] HMB["Sohag"] LXR["Luxor"] end subgraph Systems["Per-Airport Systems"] CUPPS["CUPPS
Common Use Passenger Processing"] LDCS["LDCS
Local Departure Control"] AODB["AODB
Airport Operational Database"] RMS["RMS
Resource Management"] FIDS["FIDS
Flight Information Display"] BRS["BRS
Baggage Reconciliation"] APOC["APOC
Airport Predictive Operations"] end SHJ --> Systems HRG --> Systems ALY --> Systems ASW --> Systems ABS --> Systems ASY --> Systems HMB --> Systems LXR --> Systems Systems --> COC Systems --> CCC style COC fill:#059669,color:#fff style CCC fill:#059669,color:#fff ``` **Key Requirements:** - High availability with redundant infrastructure (2 core rooms per airport) - IATA compliance: CUPPS (RP1797), CUTE/CUSS, IATA AHM 730 - 24/7 operations with 99.9% availability - Integration with airlines, ANSP, ground handling, security - Warranty: 24 months GPA, 5 years support
